name: Chicken- Asparagus Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen or fresh asparagus spears -- cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake pastry shell at 400°F for 5 minutes.
2. Place chicken over the bottom of the shell and arrange asparagus spears over the chicken.
3. Sprinkle cheese evenly over asparagus.
4. Combine eggs, cream, salt, and pepper in a bowl; blend until light and frothy.
5. Pour gently over all.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 45 minutes, or until set and a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
7. Serves 4-6.
